{
  "executive_summary": "A real-time courier bidding system built around Redis-backed atomic claim operations, WebSocket fan-out for sub-second bid delivery, and a delayed-queue scheduler for 15-second timeout auto-assignment. The design centers on a single atomic operation (Redis SETNX on a job lock key) to guarantee exactly-one-winner semantics, with all other complexity pushed to the edges. Peak load: 500 concurrent bid windows × 30 couriers = 15,000 active WebSocket connections, well within
